description: CompositionGrey and white check shirt made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar, front buttoned placket, patch pocket on the left chest with embroidered brand logo and a curved hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash at 40 degreesWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachTumble dry normal or line dryWarm ironCrafted from soft cotton and designed to offer a flattering silhouette, this shirt from highlander is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with jeans, throw over a blazer and slip into suede boots or sneakers.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
